nodes.title: Acme Eleventy Blog
nodes.summary: Acme Eleventy Blog is a fictional Eleventy fixture used by the PRD-408 conformance gate. This first paragraph is what summary extraction picks up. The rest of the document explains how the Eleventy plugin wires the markdown adapter into the ACT pipeline.
